form_name: R2R - Affair Controlling - Allocation and Settlement

questions.text: What is the purpose of using an allocation structure in SG&A assessment cycles?
options: To allocate costs based on a fixed GL Account.
To keep the origin of cost throughout Cost Centers to Cost Centers cycles.
To eliminate the need for a GL Account.

questions.text: What should the key figure category "Fixed value" be used for?
options: It should be used on a monthly basis.
It should be replaced every fiscal year.
It should be used for the remainder of the fiscal year.
It should not be used in financial calculations.

questions.text: How are key figures loaded into the system?
options: Manually entered into the system each month.
Loaded through the Fiori App "Import Statistical key figures Plan Data."
Emailed to users for manual input.

questions.text: Where can one check the loaded key figures?
options: Fiori App “Import Statistical Key Figures Plan Data”
Email reports sent by the finance department

questions.text: What should be used in Cost Center Assessment Cycles instead of directly managing percentages?
In Physical Distribution, what role does the Distribution Center play?
options: It receives costs from Business Units.A) It receives costs from Business Units.
It allocates or re-invoices costs to served Business Unit Cost Centers.

questions.text: How are COMPASS Supply Chain allocation keys determined?
What is the final destination of the keys calculated by COMPASS Supply Chain for Cost Center allocation?
options: They are discarded if not used.
They are stored in a central database.
They are emailed to department heads.
They are posted as plan data in NEO with COPA granularity.

questions.text: The allocation keys are used in Physical Distribution Cost Center allocation.
Which key figure category is used only for one month and not in the following ones?
